semanticNodeLabels: Add dedicated memory governance ledger events
Teach heartbeat to select the next governed slice after phase closure
Memory-governance decisions emit dedicated ledger events.
Audit entries capture governance results and before/after state for task mutations.
Add artifact-level governance primitives to memory records
Heartbeat self-reflection can be written without attaching to a Builder phase or cluster.
recommendedNextActions: Implement memory-governance decisions emit dedicated ledger events

before.title: Add dedicated memory governance ledger events
before.description: Record promotion approvals, rejections, contested writes, recall downgrades, and stale-memory blocks as first-class governance events so Victor can substantiate memory behavior, not just execution behavior.
acceptance: Memory-governance decisions emit dedicated ledger events.
Ledger entries distinguish promotions, demotions, contested writes, and stale recall blocks.
Memory-governance history is queryable alongside existing audit trails.

after.title: Add dedicated memory governance ledger events
